chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-140 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A No.467/26. For orders on office objections. For orders on M.A No.468/26. For hearing of main case. 23.02.2026. None present for the Petitioner. ***************************************** Through this Petition, the Petitioner sought the following relief(s); a) That this Honourable Court may be pleased to direct the Respondent No.2 to 7 to provide legal protection / security to the petitioner and his family members as well as property against the highhandedness of the private respondents and their supporters in accordance with law. b) That this Honourable Court may be pleased to direct the private respondents to not harass and pressurize the petitioner and his family members and may also give their undertaking in written before this Honourable Court in the interest of justice. c) That further this Honourable will award the relief in favour of the petitioner which will deem fit and proper in accordance with law. As per prayers of his Petition, the Petitioner seeks protection with regard to harassment allegedly caused by the private respondents. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, learned A.A.G. Sindh after waiving notice of this petition, states that legal protection would be provided to the Petitioner with regard to harassment allegedly caused by the private respondents. He further submits that the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) with directions to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner.

He further submits that the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) with directions to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner. However, this order would Page 2 of 2 not affect the legal proceedings already pending or subsequently initiated by either party. Let a copy of this order be communicated to concerned official Respondent(s) for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
